creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
The abstract <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#preamble> might benefit from a link to <https://www.freebsd.org/internal/members/>. Cross-reference: bug 264410. 

----

Under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#staff-committers>: 

> These are the people who have commit privileges and do the 
> engineering work on the FreeBSD source tree. All 
> core team members are also developers. 
> 
> (in alphabetical order by last name):

For the "source tree" (singular), I assumed /src/

As an example: names include Gordon Bergling, who, according to the three lists below, has a commit bit for /doc/ but not for /src/

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/main/share/misc/committers-doc.dot>
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/main/share/misc/committers-ports.dot>
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/main/share/misc/committers-src.dot>

– so, a false assumption. 

----

Let's make the descriptive paragraph less ambiguous. Maybe: 

> This list, which includes all members of the Core Team, names everyone 
> who has commit privileges for one or more of the three source trees 
> (doc, ports and src). By surname: 

– and include a link to <https://www.freebsd.org/administration/#t-core>.
